rules.rule_text:
rule blacklist
{
	meta:
		author = "@KevTheHermit"
		info = "Part of PasteHunter"
		reference = "https://github.com/kevthehermit/PasteHunter"

	strings:
		$a = "#EXTINF:" nocase
		$b = "--app-name=LeagueClient" nocase
		$c = "common.application_name: LeagueClient"
		$d = /java\.(util|lang|io)/
		$e = "Traceback (most recent call last)"
		$f = /define\(.*?\)|require_once\(.*?\)/
		$g = "Technic Launcher is starting"
		$h = "OTL logfile created on"

	condition:
		any of them
}
